metadata.name: Choose a 'Pull Quote' for an Article Layout

description: A print designer needs a 'pull quote' (a short, compelling excerpt) from a feature story to use as a large, graphical element in the layout.

nodes.task_description: Read through the final draft of the article.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent is familiar with the content.

nodes.task_description: Identify several short, powerful, and representative quotes from the article.

expected_outcome.expected: A list of potential pull quotes is generated.

nodes.task_description: Select the single best quote that captures the essence of the story and will entice people to read.

expected_outcome.expected: The final pull quote is chosen.

nodes.task_description: Send the selected quote to the print designer.

expected_outcome.expected: The designer receives the content they need for the layout.
